headline: Is Applied Materials (AMAT) the Best All-Time High Stock with Legs to Rally Further?
summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the 10 All-Time High Stocks with Legs to Rally Further. On June 22, 2026, Wells Fargo raised its price target on Applied Materials, Inc. headline: Navitas Semiconductor shares are trading higher. The company announced the launch of two new packages, top-side cooled QDPAK and a low-profile TO-247-4L, to its 5th-gen GeneSiC technology platform.
